title: rubus nurnbergensis
intro: Rubus nurnbergensis, also known as Nuremberg raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus nurnbergensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Rubus nurnbergensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal purposes.
